nasb.text: and all Naphtali and the land of Ephraim and Manasseh, and all the land of Judah as far as the western sea,

esv.text: all Naphtali, the land of Ephraim and Manasseh, all the land of Judah as far as the western sea,

cnv.text: 拿弗他利全地，以法蓮和瑪拿西之地，猶大全地，直到西海，

ccb.text: 拿弗他利全境、以法莲和玛拿西地区，远至地中海的犹大全境，
